reason_for_decision: The article gives beginners a clear distinction between range resolution, angular resolution, range, and accuracy, and it provides enough operational context to pass without revision.
strengths: The article keeps the central distinction between resolution and accuracy clear all the way through.
It explains range and angular resolution in plain language without flattening them into one concept.
The piece turns a technical topic into practical evaluation questions about beamwidth, range growth, and target separation.
summary_assessment: This is a strong Foundation article: it is readable, technically grounded, and useful enough to pass without revision.
